name: Dessert Nachos
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the Graham crackers in half.
2. Score each half diagonally with a knife.
3. Cut into triangles.
4. Arrange half of the crackers in a single layer on a platter.
5. Spread evenly with half of the whipped topping.
6. Top with half of the fruit.
7. Drizzle with dessert topping.
8. Repeat layers and refrigerate until serving.
